history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (">"). The goal is at row 04, column D. The cells ahead: (2,C) is floor, (2,D) is floor, then from (2,D) I can turn right to face down and proceed to (3,D) (floor) and then to (4,D) (goal). There is lava at (3,C) and (4,C), so I must avoid those. The immediate safe step is to move forward to (2,C).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. I can move forward to cell (2,D) which is a floor cell. From there, I can turn right to face down and then move down to reach the goal. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Directly ahead (right) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to change my orientation to face down to move towards the goal. Turning right (clockwise) will make me face down. After that, I can move forward onto safe floor cells to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column D facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly in front of me (row 03 column D) is floor, so I can move forward to approach the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing down (`v`). The goal is directly below me at row 04 column D (`G`). The cell in front of me is the goal cell, which is safe to occupy. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
